scripts.stress:500: npm run build && node --expose-gc --max-old-space-size=12288 dist/world-mapgen.cjs --size 128 --controls simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 5 --years 500 --civ-seed 77 --progress-every 100 --profile-civ-phases --gc-after-compaction --spill-event-text-dir output/stress-probes/probe-500-event-text --spill-event-text-after 10 --spill-event-text-every 5 --spill-event-text-cache-chunks 256 --civ-profile-dir output/stress-probes/probe-500-profiles --civ-profile-json output/stress-probes/probe-500-final.json --out output/stress-probes/probe-500-final.png
scripts.stress:1000: npm run build && node --expose-gc --max-old-space-size=12288 dist/world-mapgen.cjs --size 128 --controls simulation-controls.example.json --civilizations 5 --years 1000 --civ-seed 77 --expansion-rate 0.25 --progress-every 100 --profile-civ-phases --gc-after-compaction --spill-event-text-dir output/stress-probes/probe-1000-event-text --spill-event-text-after 10 --spill-event-text-every 5 --spill-event-text-cache-chunks 256 --civ-profile-dir output/stress-probes/probe-1000-profiles --civ-profile-json output/stress-probes/probe-1000-final.json --out output/stress-probes/probe-1000-final.png
